title: Browser & application caches
_comment: Application-level caches. The Electron/Chromium entry uses * globs to match the Cache/GPUCache/etc. folders that Electron apps (VS Code, Claude, Slack, Discord, ...) create under Application Support. These hold only re-fetchable data. method: emptytrash empties ~/.Trash (irreversible).

categories.name: Electron / Chromium app caches
categories.desc: Disk/GPU/code caches inside Electron apps (VS Code, Claude, Slack, ...) — rebuilt on launch.

categories.name: Browser caches
categories.desc: HTTP/disk caches for Chrome, Brave, Edge, Vivaldi, Arc, Firefox — safe to clear.

categories.name: Sandboxed app caches
categories.desc: Caches inside sandboxed (App Store) apps' containers — rebuilt as needed.

categories.name: Crash & diagnostic logs
categories.desc: Old crash reports & simulator diagnostic logs — regenerated as needed.

categories.name: Empty the Trash
categories.desc: Permanently erase everything currently in the Trash — cannot be undone.
